mission: HEXA-SPEAK Mk.III e2e bench + ALM wire verification

runtime.note: hexa_v2 in /workspace/hexa-lang/self/native is the hexa-cc compiler stub, not an interpreter. Interpreter is hexa_stage0 (3.9MB).

alm_serve_wire_check.diagnosis: Live ALM pod runs Python serve_alm_14b.py, NOT hexa http_server.hexa. Source code voice_routes.hexa + http_server.hexa wiring exists locally but is never executed in production. Voice path is completely absent from the LIVE serving runtime.

bench_hexa_speak_run.critical_caveat: ALL bench numbers are HARD-CODED LITERALS, not measured. t_intent=8, t_token=42, t_vocoder=36 are constants in the .hexa source. Bench file self-identifies as 'Mk.I skeleton, simulated runs'. No actual runtime is measured. No audio is produced. No CUDA path is exercised.

backend_test.SPEAK_TTS_BACKEND=vocoder: emits SAME RIFF-MOCK text — tag reports 'vocoder-fallback'
backend_test.source_comment: // TODO[vocoder-bridge]: call neural_vocoder.decode_wave once a hexa-callable entry point exists. Fallback preserves I5.

voice_profiles_run.note: Profiles are parameter tables (pitch_hz, formant_shift, tempo_wpm, prosody_bias, style_tag) — not audio weights. Self-test output says: 'remaining_work: neural_vocoder.hexa 통합 (P4 SERVING task)'

source_audit.intent_encoder_hexa: 37 lines, Mk.I skeleton, returns string tag 'intent[vec|d=384,h=6]'
source_audit.neural_vocoder_hexa: 42 lines, Mk.I skeleton, returns string tag 'pcm[sr=24000,samples=N]'
source_audit.audio_token_predictor_hexa: 56 lines, Mk.I skeleton, emits tok=(step*7)%1024 integer

readiness_gaps_ranked.gap: Live ALM serve pod runs Python serve_alm_14b.py — voice_routes.hexa / http_server.hexa are never invoked. Voice wiring exists in source only.
neural_vocoder.hexa is a 42-line skeleton — no DSP, no ISTFT, no GAN. Returns string tag. TODO(Mk.II) markers throughout. No hexa-callable entry from speak_e2e.tts_synthesize.
audio_token_predictor.hexa is 56 lines — no transformer, no KV-cache, no RVQ head. Emits deterministic (step*7)%1024 integer per frame. No weights trained.

bench 100ms latency is a hard-coded fiction (t_intent=8, t_token=42, t_vocoder=36 are literal constants). No real path measured. Interpreter-level wall time is 0.01s because it's pure string concatenation.
1.8GB voice corpus exists locally but never deployed to any pod. No training run has consumed it. No checkpoints for 10 voice profiles.

interpretation_vs_native.note: 0.01s is string-concat only; real neural compute would require CUDA FFI which is absent in the module.

first_packet_latency_claim_vs_reality.gap: Claimed 100ms is architectural budget. Not a measured number.

shippable_verdict.classification: Architecture complete (no syntactic TODOs in hexa_speak.hexa main flow), functional implementation 0%. All load-bearing neural components (vocoder, predictor, intent encoder) return string stubs.
shippable_verdict.honest_status: STRUCTURAL_SCAFFOLD — 5/5 bench PASS is a structural check of parameter tables and dim constants. Zero audio bytes have ever been synthesized by this module.

recommended_next_step.rationale: v2.0 RC criterion '음성 입출력 (anima-speak Mk.III) E2E' is not met. Do NOT claim voice I/O shippable.
options_in_priority_order: 1. SSOT honesty: update shared/convergence/anima.json to mark HEXA-SPEAK status=scaffold, not done. Prevents downstream claims.
2. Port bridge: implement neural_vocoder.decode_wave → real Vocos/HiFi-GAN via hxcuda FFI (matches hxlmhead pattern). Blocked until Hexa can call CUDA kernels for STFT/iSTFT.
3. Python fallback: have serve_alm_14b.py import a small Python TTS (Coqui XTTS or Piper) and add /voice/tts there as a stopgap. Ships in hours, not weeks.
4. Train weights: spin up hexa-c4 (already up, $0.22/hr) for LJSpeech/voice_profiles pre-train — but this blocks on option 2.
5. Do not expand source — freeze at current state, document as research scaffold in anima-speak/CLAUDE.md.
recommended_next_step.most_honest_near_term: Option 3 (Python Piper stopgap) + Option 1 (SSOT honesty). Gets real 24kHz audio to ALM pod /voice/tts within a day. Hexa-native vocoder = multi-week project.
recommended_next_step.do_not: Do NOT restart ALM serve pod to add voice_routes. http_server.hexa is not the live binary. Restarting would take down /generate without adding voice.
